mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: psychosis, neurological symptoms (restlessness, shuffling gait), hepatosplenomegaly (abnormal abdominal morphology), pulmonary involvement (dyspnea, cough)

angiokeratomas (skin lesions), hypohidrosis (reduced sweating), corneal opacities (foveal and macular hyperpigmentation), proteinuria (protein deficiencies), cardiovascular issues (palpitations, arrhythmias)
joint hypermobility, skin fragility (eczematoid dermatitis, easy bruising), increased risk of hernias (abnormal abdominal wall), decreased urine output
peripheral neuropathy, retinitis pigmentosa (night blindness, macular degeneration), anosmia (loss of smell), skeletal deformities (short stature, bowed legs), hearing impairments
seizures (psychotic episodes), eczematoid rash, non-specific learning disabilities, facial angiofibromas, leukodystrophies
progressive muscular weakness, enlargement of heart and liver, respiratory distress, feeding difficulties, delayed motor milestones
dysostosis multiplex, kyphoscoliosis, short stature, coarse face, dental anomalies, respiratory compromise
sensorineural hearing loss, obesity, diabetes mellitus, cataracts, dilated cardiomyopathy, pancreatic insufficiency
demyelinative disorder, irritability, spastic paraplegia, mental regression, optic nerve damage, seizures
